case_title: QUARANTA, MICHELLA vs. VEGA, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUARANTA, MICHELLA AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
